meaning: n.华尔兹舞,华尔兹舞曲adj.华尔兹舞的,华尔兹舞曲的vi.跳华尔兹舞,前进,旋转vt.迫使前进,与...跳华尔兹舞
examples: The next dance will be a waltz.
She played a Chopin waltz as an encore.
Arthur Murray taught the foxtrot, the tango and the waltz.
There is also a proposal to make the "Beautiful Connecticut Waltz" the second state song.
Ms. AMY WALTZ(ph) (American Home Mortgage, Bethesda, Maryland): I was pretty openmouthed, stammering, flabbergasted.
